chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: 127- وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من أحب الأعمال إلى الله عزو جل إدخال السرور على أخيه المؤمن [من] إشباع جوعته، أو تنفيس كربته أو قضاء دينه

en.muhajir-b-ali: 127. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Amongst the deeds most loved by Allah are (for a person) to bring joy to his fellow believer by satiating his hunger, relieving his distress or paying off his debt.
